statement: H100 GPU cloud rental prices span roughly $1.49 to $6.98 per GPU-hour across 15+ providers, with most clustering around $2-4 per GPU-hour.
why: Cloud H100 rental price levels are a demand/supply confirmation overlay; the wide dispersion reflects spot/marketplace versus reserved and provider-tier differences, but no baseline or change is stated so it is a static level.

impact.mechanism: Per-GPU-hour rental price levels reflect the supply-demand balance for H100 capacity across cloud and marketplace providers.

evidence.excerpt: H100 Rental Prices Compared: $1.49-$6.98/hr Across 15+ Cloud Providers (2026)

confidence.basis: Single secondary aggregator article; static price levels with no stated baseline or change.

dispersion: $1.49-$6.98/GPU-hr across providers; marketplace/spot lows near $1.49 (Vast.ai) up to ~$6.98 (Azure), clustering $2-4.
